versionEntries.text: Kabuto is a Pokémon that has been regenerated from a fossil. However, in extremely rare cases, living examples have been discovered. The Pokémon has not changed at all for 300 million years.
It is thought to have inhabited beaches 300 million years ago. It is protected by a stiff shell.
